    L

    LegoApp - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    LegoApp() - Constructor for class LegoApp
     
    LegoAppGUI - Class in Unnamed Package
    LegoAppGUI class provides the graphical user interface for managing Lego Sets using JavaFX Users can connect to a database, add, update, remove and load Lego sets from a file.
    LegoAppGUI() - Constructor for class LegoAppGUI
     
    LegoDAO - Class in Unnamed Package
    The LegoDAO class acts as the Data Access Object for interacting with the lego_sets table in the SQLite database Provides methods to crate, read, update and delete (CRUD) legoset records.
    LegoDAO() - Constructor for class LegoDAO
     
    LegoSet - Class in Unnamed Package
    LegoSet Class This class represents a single Lego set and stores its details.
    LegoSet() - Constructor for class LegoSet
    Default constructor Allows creation of a LegoSet object without initial values.
    LegoSet(String, String, int, double, int, int) - Constructor for class LegoSet
    Parameterized constructor Creates a LegoSet object with all attributes provided.
    LegoSetManager - Class in Unnamed Package
    LegoSetManager Class This class manages a collection of LegoSet objects.
    LegoSetManager() - Constructor for class LegoSetManager
    Default constructor Initializes the ArrayList that will store Lego sets.
    listSets() - Method in class LegoSetManager
    Returns the full list of Lego sets.
    loadSetsFromFile(String) - Method in class LegoSetManager
    Load Lego Sets from a text file.
